title: Faster Happy Ghast
description: The happy ghast will not be slow af anymore.
body:
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a831c6a6c5b93dba02f075648b6a8f752bbda852.webp)
**Faster Happy Ghast** is a Mod / Data Pack that dynamically adjusts the flying speed of Happy Ghasts based on whether a player is riding them. ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfb969abdb4866bdaf41ab139d55ddd1ad332060_0.webp) ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5da0442fcc8f2d77453f4c79a2bfcb0c84b1c0fc.png) When a player mounts a Happy Ghast, the entity becomes faster and more responsive, providing a smoother and more thrilling flying experience. Once the player dismounts, the Ghast returns to its normal speed. The behavior relies on modifying the entity’s flying_speed attribute: - **With a player riding**: flying_speed = 0.1 - **Without a rider**: flying_speed = 0.05 The speed is updated in real time, ensuring a seamless transition between states and an immersive gameplay experience. ## Configurable speed The speed is now configurable by a scoreboard (only op players can change that). The option has 3 level of speed: - 1: 0.075 - 2: 0.1 - 3: 0.125 The option is configurable through this command ``` /scoreboard players set &speed fgh.config <1,2,3> ``` # Website If you have any questions, need assistance, or simply want to share your thoughts or feedback, feel free to reach out. We're always here to help and would love to hear from you – whether you're looking for answers, suggestions, or just want to let us know how we're doing.
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a21d1c453796757f5e27ce9b94e648664755964_0.webp)![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb8b289a15c3eee79a8540f279e3486f6e7e22fc.png) ## Other links [![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1939f49bcb6e53e1f7c526c007eeb1be4a69aeb2.png)‎](https://it.fiverr.com/diesse2007) [![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/169f5456fb11650701a2af7890b911e62386388e_0.webp)‎](https://x.com/dskianto) [![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c38479243db42f491e3674a0ccda6de2c934b7f.png)‎](https://wanmine.net/)
